AdminMemberTransferRequest.description: Organizer request to move a member between teams.

replacement_captain_id.description: Required successor when the member currently captains the source team.

AdminMemberTransferResponse.description: Both rosters after an organizer member transfer.

AdminTeamMergeRequest.description: Organizer request to merge a source team into a surviving target.

target_team_id.description: Surviving team that receives the source roster and history.

AnswerInput.description: Author-submitted answer rule. Exact plaintext is digested before storage.

ChallengeResponse.description: Player-safe challenge response. Answer rules never appear here.

solved.description: Whether the authenticated competitor has already solved it.

CompetitorProfileResponse.description: Player-safe identity, standing, roster, and recent event activity.

members.description: Team roster for a team profile.

recent_solves.description: Recent activity under the same concealment rules as the scoreboard.

oneOf.description: Current visible overall standing, absent when hidden or unranked.

teams.description: Team associations for a user profile.

CreateApiTokenRequest.description: New API-token request. The cleartext token is returned exactly once.

event_ids.description: Optional event allow-list. An empty list is organization-wide.

expires_in_days.description: Lifetime in days; defaults to 30 and cannot exceed 365.

scopes.description: Fine-grained permission keys, each bounded by the caller's live RBAC.

event_ids.description: Optional event allow-list. Empty means organization-wide.

CreateOidcProviderRequest.description:
Provider creation input. Callback URLs are derived from the server's
canonical public origin rather than accepted from browser input.

allow_email_link.description: Link to an existing verified local account by matching email.

auto_provision.description: Create a canonical player on first login.

client_secret.description: OAuth client secret, encrypted before persistence.

enabled.description: Expose the provider on the login page.

CreateSamlProviderRequest.description:
Provider creation input. Service-provider URLs are always derived from the
canonical browser origin rather than accepted from the browser.

allow_email_link.description: Link to an existing verified account by assertion email.

auto_provision.description: Create a player after the first valid assertion.

display_name_attribute.description: Exact signed assertion attribute containing display name.

email_attribute.description: Exact signed assertion attribute containing email.

enabled.description: Expose the provider on the login page.

metadata_signing_certificate.description: Optional pinned PEM certificate that must sign the metadata document.

metadata_url.description: HTTPS metadata URL fetched through Kitsune's SSRF policy.

metadata_xml.description: Pasted IdP metadata XML. Exactly one metadata source is required.

CreateTeamResponse.description: One-time team creation response. The invite code is never retrievable later.

token.description: PASETO v4.local bearer value, shown exactly once.

EventRegistrationRequest.description: Optional placement selected during event registration.

competitor_kind.description: `user` or `team` under the event participation policy.

oneOf.description: Registration details, absent until the competitor registers.

charged.description: Score points charged by this request.

replayed.description: True when no second charge was applied.

invite_code.description: Opaque code supplied by a captain.

mfa_code.description: Six-digit TOTP or a single-use recovery code when MFA is enabled.

ManualReviewResponse.description: Pending manual-verification evidence visible only to submission managers.

answer.description: Decrypted evidence, never persisted or logged as plaintext.

scope.description: Optional space-delimited subset of registered scopes.

PasskeyAuthenticatorResponse.description:
Union of attestation and assertion response fields. Registration and login
handlers pass the appropriate subset to the protocol verifier.

flow_id.description:
One-time flow identifier. Verification also requires the private,
encrypted browser-binding cookie.

awarded_points.description: Total solve and first-blood points awarded.

first_blood.description: Whether this was the first accepted solve.

ProfileStandingResponse.description: Visible ranked standing for a competitor.

ProfileTeamResponse.description: Public team association on a user profile.

start_path.description: Same-origin route that begins the authorization flow.

RecoveryCodesResponse.description: Recovery codes are returned exactly once.

codes.description: Single-use codes. The operator must store these safely.

RecoveryCompleteRequest.description: Complete recovery with a new password.

RecoveryStartRequest.description: Begin recovery without revealing whether an identity exists.

accepted.description: Accept and score the submission when true; otherwise discard it.

note.description: Optional reviewer note, up to 10,000 bytes.

feedback.description: Review feedback, required when requesting changes.

acs_uri.description: Canonical HTTP-POST assertion consumer service URL.

idp_entity_id.description: IdP entity ID parsed from metadata.

metadata_url.description: Optional source URL used to ingest metadata.

metadata_verified.description: Whether a pinned certificate verified the metadata signature.

sp_entity_id.description: Canonical Kitsune SP entity ID and metadata URL.

SaveWriteupRequest.description: Player writeup draft or submission input.

submit.description: Enter the organizer review queue after saving.

ScoreHistoryPointResponse.description: One running-total point in score history.

ScoreHistoryResponse.description: Historical graph data under scoreboard concealment rules.

frozen.description: Post-freeze entries are concealed from players.

hidden.description: Organizer has hidden the public board.

frozen.description: Post-freeze entries are concealed from players.

hidden.description: Organizer has hidden the public board.

SessionResponse.description: Session bootstrap used by the Svelte client.

csrf_token.description: CSRF value required in `x-csrf-token` on mutations.

current.description: Whether this is the calling session.

required.description: True when no user exists and setup can be completed.

name.description: Human-readable device label shown in account security.

awarded_points.description: Total solve and bonus points awarded.

replayed.description: True when an earlier response was replayed by idempotency key.

answer.description: Flag, regular-expression candidate, or selected choice.

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated UUID reused for safe retries.

answers.description: Integer answers keyed by authored question key.

SurveyQuestionSummaryResponse.description: Aggregate statistics for one survey question.

TotpEnrollmentResponse.description: TOTP enrollment data for an authenticator application.

allow_email_link.description: Link to an existing verified local account by matching email.

auto_provision.description: Create a canonical player on first login.

client_secret.description: Replacement secret. Omit to retain the current encrypted value.

enabled.description: Expose the provider on the login page.

allow_email_link.description: Link to an existing verified account by assertion email.

auto_provision.description: Create a player after the first valid assertion.

display_name_attribute.description: Exact signed assertion attribute containing display name.

email_attribute.description: Exact signed assertion attribute containing email.

enabled.description: Expose the provider on the login page.

metadata_signing_certificate.description: Optional pinned PEM certificate that must sign the metadata document.

metadata_url.description: Replacement HTTPS metadata URL. Omit both sources to retain current metadata.

metadata_xml.description: Replacement IdP metadata XML. Omit both sources to retain current metadata.

frozen.description: Conceal new score entries while preserving the last public snapshot.

VisibilityInput.description: Visibility window, division targeting, and unlock graph.

info.description: Typed organizer, player, integration, and realtime API
info.title: Kitsune API

parameters.description: Provider cancellation or protocol error key.
parameters.name: error

parameters.description: Application-local page to open after authentication.
parameters.name: return_to

get.summary: Lists account-owned passkeys without exposing credential material.

post.summary: Completes passwordless passkey login and issues the standard Kitsune session.
Begins an email-first passwordless passkey login.

parameters.description: Organization slug entered on the login page.
parameters.name: organization

parameters.description: Application-local page to open after authentication.
parameters.name: return_to

303.description: Redirect carrying a signed SAML request

parameters.description: Number of leading competitors to return; defaults to 5 and caps at 20.
parameters.name: limit
